## 📜 Description
*Summarize the changes made to Omoikane (e.g., added a new lore vault or fixed a logic trigger).*

## 🧪 Testing Performed
- [ ] Verified API response at `/validate`
- [ ] Tested Discord bot command `!analyze`
- [ ] Checked for lore-contradiction accuracy

## 🚩 Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README/Wiki) accordingly.
- [ ] New lore data has been sanitized of HTML/junk text.
